title: KitchenPerfected Quiet Boil Eco-Friendly Lightweight Cordless Kettle - 1100w, 1 cup boil, 0.8 Litre (4 cups), Built-in Filter, Elderly, Hotels, B&B's - Stainless Steel - E1575BS
features: QUIET BOIL: This kettle uses quiet boil technology and with super-fast heating means you can boil water within a few minutes. Suitable for both left hand and right handed users, the 360 degree base means the kettle is always within easy reach.
SPEEDY BREW: Saving you time and energy, you can enjoy a quick brew in a matter of minutes, you can boil up 1 cup (200 ml) in under a minute and save energy compared with the typical usage.

CAPACITY: 0.8 litre capacity will fill roughly 4 cups or mugs (each 200ml) which is ideal for families and with the clear water window you can add just the right amount of water you need for that round of hot drinks. The water window clearly marks each individual cup fill from 1 to 4 cups.
SAFE & CONVENIENT: The built-in boil dry protection and automatic shut - off settings added safety whilst in use. The 360 degrees base with cord storage is of easy accessibility.

ECO-FRIENDLY: Not only is the packaging fully recyclable with no plastic packing, reducing waste and protecting the environment and oceans, but you can also reduce your Carbon Footprint, by only boiling the exact amount of water needed for each drink. Saving electricity costs. This unique kettle can boil just a single cup in under a minute.
description: This KitchenPerfected kettle boasts a sleek, lightweight and cordless design with a hinged lid and 360 degree rotating base for your convenience when refilling and clear and precise individual cup markings on the water window. You can boil a single cup in less than a minute, not only saving you time, but money on energy bills too! The 0.8 litre capacity means you can make up to four cups at any one time, perfect for families.The packaging contains no plastic bags, which helps protect our Oceans, and is fully recyclable. Doing our bit to save the planet!Boiling only the water you need can save energy consumption, which reduces your Carbon footprint and the water windows show individual cup markings making it easier for you to select the desired amount of water, from 1 to 4 cups.For your safety, the kettle has been fitted with an automatic shut off feature to prevent the appliance from overheating after it has reached boiling point or if there isn't sufficient water present. Box Includes :KitchenPerfected 0.8Ltr 4 Cup Eco-Friendly Cordless KettleInstruction Manual
